# Templates (canonical path)

All Dealix delivery templates live under **`docs/templates/`** (not a separate repo root `templates/` unless legacy tooling requires a symlink).

Files:

- `intake_form.md`
- `scope_of_work.md`
- `data_request.md`
- `delivery_checklist.md`
- `qa_checklist.md`
- `executive_report.md`
- `proof_pack.md`
- `proof_pack_2.md` (Proof Pack 2.0 — closed-loop / retainer bridge)
- `client_handoff.md`
- `renewal_proposal.md`
- `PROPOSAL_BODY.md` (linked from [`../sales/PROPOSAL_SYSTEM.md`](../sales/PROPOSAL_SYSTEM.md))
- `LEARNING_LOOP.md` (closure gate + compounding loop)

Service-specific overrides live in [`../services/`](../services/).
